examples: I know a toupee when I see one.
When he grew bald he bought a toupee.
How much did you spend on that bad toupee?
The food-in-teeth dilemma, smudged lipstick syndrome, missing-a-belt-loop quandary and sliding toupee misfortune are similar predicaments.
Star Trek's Captain Kirk offers the best visual treat, watching his toupee fly off from the force of a good thwack!
